title: Low-profile AMR with payload deck
prompt: A low-profile autonomous mobile robot for warehouse logistics, rectangular body, four visible wheels, flat payload deck, industrial blue-gray material, front lidar sensor, clean orthographic product view, white background
notes: AMR body silhouette and wheel visibility are important.

title: Pallet-carrying AMR
prompt: An industrial pallet-carrying AMR robot, compact rectangular chassis, orange safety bumper, black rubber wheels, top lifting platform, warehouse automation asset, orthographic view, white background
notes: Should preserve top lift platform and bumper.

title: Six-axis robot arm
prompt: A six-axis industrial robot arm mounted on a circular base, orange metal body, visible joints and end effector, factory automation asset, clean isolated view, white background
notes: Joint segmentation is the key quality criterion.

title: Collaborative robot arm
prompt: A collaborative robot arm for assembly line work, white and gray segments, six joints, small gripper end effector, rounded industrial design, isolated orthographic view
notes: Avoid organic shapes; keep articulated arm structure.

title: Straight roller conveyor
prompt: A straight industrial roller conveyor segment, steel frame, evenly spaced cylindrical rollers, adjustable legs, warehouse simulation asset, orthographic view, white background

title: Belt conveyor with guard rails
prompt: A black belt conveyor with metal guard rails, industrial warehouse automation equipment, rectangular long form, support legs, clean product render on white background
notes: Long axis and guard rail geometry matter.

title: Blue warehouse pallet rack
prompt: A blue steel warehouse pallet rack, three levels, orange beams, empty storage bays, industrial logistics asset, front orthographic view, white background
notes: Should preserve repeated rack bays and levels.

title: Rack with boxes
prompt: A warehouse storage rack with cardboard boxes, blue vertical frames, orange horizontal beams, multiple shelves, industrial digital twin asset, isolated view
notes: Boxes should not merge into shelf frame.

title: Pallet with stacked boxes
prompt: A wooden pallet carrying stacked cardboard boxes wrapped for warehouse transport, clean industrial asset, front perspective, white background
notes: Good simple asset for baseline quality checks.

title: Warehouse worker with safety vest
prompt: A warehouse worker wearing yellow safety vest and hard hat, standing neutral pose, industrial simulation human asset, simple clean shape, white background
notes: Optional human context entity for scene parser.

title: AMR charging dock
prompt: A compact AMR charging station dock for warehouse robots, wall-mounted charging panel, floor guide marker, industrial black and gray material, isolated view
notes: Useful support asset for AMR scenes.

title: Industrial safety fence
prompt: A modular yellow and black industrial safety fence segment, metal posts, mesh panel, factory safety barrier, orthographic view, white background
notes: Thin geometry may fail; good failure analysis case.
